templates.name: Twitter/X Media Downloader
templates.description: Adds download buttons to tweets containing images and videos on Twitter/X. Supports one-click download of individual media and batch download of multiple images as a ZIP file.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Twitter/X Media Downloader
scripts.description: Scans tweets for media (images and videos) and injects download buttons. Supports individual downloads and batch ZIP packaging for multi-image tweets.
